scope.question: Create endpoint-specific synthesis compatibility groups for the D+Q postmenopausal bone RCT outcome/result records.

inputs.summary: Coordinator prompt defining the D+Q bone endpoint synthesis-group rerun scope and required output contract.
Existing broad mixed D+Q bone synthesis compatibility group used as boundary context and left unchanged.
ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 posted-results snapshot for NCT04313634.
PubMed EFetch metadata and abstract snapshot for PMID 38956196.
Scoped D+Q bone result records evaluated for endpoint-specific synthesis compatibility.

outputs.summary: Created the submitted endpoint-synthesis candidate and six endpoint-specific synthesis_group records. All new endpoint groups remain pooling_blocked with controlled blockers for result count, time horizon, missing uncertainty, descriptive-only effects, and safety event-specific extraction; the existing broad mixed group was not edited.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks the endpoint-specific synthesis compatibility change set and required review lanes.
Separates the primary 20-week CTx result from mixed endpoint synthesis and records count, p-value-only, and missing-uncertainty blockers.
Groups the 2-week and 4-week P1NP short-term signals while preserving time-horizon and missing-uncertainty blockers.
Separates the 20-week P1NP null result from short-term P1NP signals and records count plus missing effect blockers.
Separates the 20-week BMD descriptive result and records site-specific extraction and descriptive-only effect blockers.
Separates the 2-week SASP result and records count, marker-identity, p-value-only, and missing-uncertainty blockers.
Separates the aggregate 20-week safety result and records safety event-specific extraction blockers.

quality_checks.summary: npm run validate:records passed and validated 103 JSON file(s).
npm run audit:references passed for 97 record file(s).
npm run export:latest completed and wrote 11 export file(s) to exports/latest.
npm run verify:knowledge-base passed, including validation, reference audit, export audit, agent schema audit, and agentic process audit.
The final outputs.proposed_records list mirrors the candidate_change.proposed_records list for the seven changed canonical records.
The submitted candidate declares taxonomy_mapping, synthesis_boundary, and safety_limitations as required review lanes and was not promoted.

Run promotion only after required review lanes are complete, accepting, and non-blocking.
